hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'push origin main' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'push origin main:'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Production push blocked. Say \"push to production\" or \"push to main\" explicitly to authorize."}'; else echo '{"decision":"allow"}'; fi
echo '{"systemMessage": "Reminder: run \u0060git pull\u0060 to sync any changes from your other machine before starting work."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Reminder: commit and push your work so it\u0027s available on your other machine — \u0060git add -A && git commit -m \"wip\" && git push\u0060"}'
